sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 337 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2794/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. This reference application is pending since 2018 without any progress, even notice has not been sought. Diary denotes that on 14.01.20019, following order was passed: “14-01-2019 Rana Sakhawat Ali, adv. holding brief for Mr. M. Aqeel Qureshi, adv. who could not reach the court on account of some personal emergency and requests for adjournment. Adjourned.” On 22.09.2025, following order was passed: “22.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2018 without any progress. Today learned counsel seeks time to file amended question of law. At his request, adjourned to 29.09.2025.” Today learned counsel seeks further time to reformulate the questions of law arising herein, however, such request could not be acceded time and time again. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
